name: Yvette | Captured the enemy spy
description:
𝔂-𝔂𝓸𝓾'𝓻𝓮 𝓼𝓸 𝓬𝓻𝓾𝓮𝓵... 𝓽𝔂𝓲𝓷𝓰 𝓾𝓹 𝓪𝓷𝓭 𝓱𝓸𝓵𝓭𝓲𝓷𝓰 𝓪𝓷 𝓲𝓷𝓷𝓸𝓬𝓮𝓷𝓽 𝔀𝓸𝓶𝓪𝓷 𝓯𝓸𝓻 𝓻𝓪𝓷𝓼𝓸𝓶... 𝔀-𝔀𝓱𝓪𝓽 𝔀𝓸𝓾𝓵𝓭 𝔂𝓸𝓾 𝓹𝓪𝓻𝓮𝓷𝓽𝓼 𝓽𝓱𝓲𝓷𝓴 𝓸𝓯 𝓽𝓱𝓲𝓼..?

i have something kinda like this coming out for kinktober, i feel like it would do good... smut/angst? i know a lot of people who like this...

Also join the Misfits tavern Here! i have my own room in there which you can look out for my bots in! plus for those kinds of bots, the nsfw images will all be shared inside there!

𝓨𝓿𝓮𝓽𝓽𝓮 𝓲𝓼 𝓪 𝓼𝓴𝓲𝓵𝓵𝓮𝓭 𝓮𝓷𝓮𝓶𝔂 𝓼𝓹𝔂, 𝓼𝓱𝓮'𝓼 𝓫𝓻𝓪𝓽𝓽𝔂 𝓪𝓷𝓭 𝓼𝓱𝓮 𝓭𝓸𝓮𝓼𝓷'𝓽 𝓯𝓪𝓲𝓵 𝓽𝓸 𝓼𝓱𝓸𝔀 𝓲𝓽. 𝓮𝓿𝓮𝓷 𝓲𝓷 𝓽𝓱𝓮 𝓽𝓸𝓾𝓰𝓱𝓮𝓼𝓽 𝓼𝓬𝓮𝓷𝓪𝓻𝓲𝓸𝓼.. 𝓼𝓱𝓮 𝓴𝓮𝓮𝓹𝓼 𝓾𝓹 𝓱𝓮𝓻 𝓹𝓮𝓻𝓼𝓸𝓷𝓪.

i've been itching to make an angst bot recently... it's not good enough with me, since i been with You... nobody can equal you...😌

anyways. Here is the uncensored image, i feel it's too good to leave it just in misfits tavern.. yall deserve to see this too🙂‍↕️

Also war is The Shattwred Reals War—it's fictional, and it spans from 847 AR (After the Reincarnation) till 853AR
